name: skill-lens
description: Analytics dashboard for skill usage, health metrics, and A/B test results.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect skill usage, health, and A/B metrics.
interface.longDescription: Skill Lens provides terminal skills and a local dashboard for reviewing skill usage, satisfaction, token consumption, and A/B test results across Codex or Claude data sources.
defaultPrompt: Show a 30-day overview for skill usage.
Review health metrics for one skill.
